Construct restaurant (Raising Canes Chicken Fingers) with drive-thru window in planned multi-use site. ------ STATUS: REFERRED to the 4/27/2016 PC mtg by the PC on 2/2/2016.Request/Application Type:Conditional UseLegislative Files:9080390918Status:Application Under Review

Rezone 411 W. Gilman Street, construct 15-story mixed-use building with 2,550 sq. ft. of commercial space and 260 multi-family units following demolition of 411, 415, and 433 W Gilman Street (Legistar Files 90916, 90614, 91233, 91234, 91236 & 89582). ------ STATUS: REFERRED to the 2/18/2026 UDC mtg, 3/2/2026 PC mtg and 3/10/2026 CC mtg at the request of the applicant.Request/Application Type:Rezoning (DC and UMX to UMX), Conditional Use, Demolition PermitLegislative Files:91234909169061489582Status:Application Under Review

Amend PD-GDP and PD-SIP to construct a one-story, 10,700 sq. ft. clubhouse for Monticello Apartments. ------ STATUS: REFERRED to the 2/2/2026 PC mtg by the PC on 12/15/2025 at the request of the applicant.Request/Application Type:Amendment to Existing PD-GDP, Amendment to Existing PD-SIPLegislative Files:9093689634Status:Application Under Review

Rezone parcel with existing mixed-use building from PD (Planned Development) to DC (Downtown Core) zoning district.Request/Application Type:Rezoning (PD to DC)Legislative Files:TBDStatus:Agency Reviews in Process
Rezone to facilitate expansion of office buildingRequest/Application Type:Rezoning (PD & TR-V1 to CC-T)Legislative Files:87843Status:In Process

The American Center Eastpark Fifth Addition, creating 2 lots for future mixed-use dvlpmnt, 7 lots for future MF dvlpmnt, 1 outlot for private parkland, and 1 outlot for public strmwtr mgmnt. (Also includes Rezoning request to rezoning the land from SEC to CC-T and TR-U2. Request, Legistar File 75182, was approved on 2/7/2023). (Wasn't recorded within one year. Reapproved by Council on 7/16/2024 (Legistar File 83902))Request/Application Type:SUBDIVISION PLATLegislative Files:74911Status:In Process

Preliminary plat and final plat of the American Center Eastpark Fourth Addition, creating two employment lots, an outlot for private open space, and an outlot for a private drive. (Wasn't recorded within one year. Reapproved by Council on 7/12/2022 (Legistar File 71941). Re-approval also included granting a waiver or variance to one or more design requirements in Sec 16.23(8) of the Subdiv. Regs, as allowed by Section 16.23(10).)Request/Application Type:SUBDIVISION PLATLegislative Files:67273Status:In Process

Demolish restaurant-tavern to construct restaurant with vehicle access sales and service window, outdoor eating area and parking exceeding the maximum allowed. ------ STATUS: REFERRED by the PC on 8/10/2020 to a future meeting at the request of the applicant. (Eventually replaced by subsequent submittal. Handled under same Legistar File ID (60000). Considered INACTIVE.Request/Application Type:Conditional Use, Demolition PermitLegislative Files:6000060000Status:In Process

Madison Yards at Hill Farms Block 2 in Urban Design District No. 6. Planned Development District. Project consists of a 50,000 sq. ft grocery store, a 6-story, 150-room hotel, 135 structured parking stalls, and associated loading. ------ STATUS: ON HOLDRequest/Application Type:Amendment to Existing PD-GDP, Amendment to Existing PD-SIPLegislative Files:58985Status:In Process

Create one industrial lot and three industrial outlots. ------ STATUS: APPROVED by Council on 9/3/2019 but considered APPROVAL EXPIRED per Wis. Stat. § 236.34(2).Request/Application Type:Certified Survey MapLegislative Files:56580Status:In Process
Create one commercial lot.Request/Application Type:Certified Survey MapLegislative Files:54205Status:In Process

A newly purposed, or revised bldg, is a 4-sty mixed-use bldg w/ 1 level of structured pkg, 1st floor commercial space, & 44 rental hsg units on levels 1-4. (Net change: -1 sty & -4 condo units (4 dwelling units)) (A revised version of Legistar Files 42565 and 41853) (See LNDSPR-2017-00015 for Agency Verification of Conditions)Request/Application Type:Conditional UseLegislative Files:45249Status:In Process

Construct mixed-use development w/ 173 residential & 7900 sq. ft. of commercial in (3) 3-5-story. Proposal to add 2 apts, bringing the total from 171 to 173 units. (Developments 2015 approval under Legistar Files 44824 (PD Amendment) & 40007 (UDC)) (See LNDSPR-2016-00021 for Agency Verification of Conditions)Request/Application Type:Amendment to Existing PD-GDP, Amendment to Existing PD-SIPLegislative Files:44824Status:In Process

Construct 8-story, 158,000 sq. ft. office building in Urban Design District No. 1. Parking off-site through lease of spaces at City pkg ramp to be constructed adjacent to site. (See LNDSPR-2017-00008 for Agency Verification of Conditions)Request/Application Type:Conditional UseLegislative Files:4482643555Status:In Process

Establish vehicle access sales and service window for multi-tenant commercial building. (See LNDSPR-2017-00002 for Agency Verification of Conditions)Request/Application Type:Conditional UseLegislative Files:44566Status:In Process

Convert existing 138,600 GSF Sears into 3 tenant spaces to include a smaller 56,000 sq. ft. Sears store, a 31,630 sq. ft. 'Dave & Busters' restaurant-tavern/arcade, & a 25,000 sq. ft. space for a future retail tenant, & to convert the Sears Auto Repair bldg. (See LNDSPR-2017-00010 for Agency Verification of Conditions)Request/Application Type:Conditional UseLegislative Files:4457043732Status:In Process
Demolish a commercial building with no proposed use. (See LNDSPR-2016-00240 for Agency Verification of Conditions)Request/Application Type:Demolition PermitLegislative Files:44434Status:In Process

Construct 80 unit apt bldg. PD Zoning. (See LNDSPR-2017-00006 for Agency Verification of Conditions)Request/Application Type:Rezoning (PD to PD-SIP), Amendment to Existing PD-GDPLegislative Files:4473243951Status:In Process

Construct auto sales facility (Don Miller Subaru East) exceeding 25,000 sq. ft. of GFA in CC-T zoning. (See LNDSPR-2016-00254 for Agency Verification of Conditions)Request/Application Type:Conditional UseLegislative Files:44431Status:In Process

Construct a 4-story, 105-room hotel (Tru Hotel (by Hilton)) on a vacant lot in the Ganser Heights Planned development. (See LNDSPR-2017-00017 for Agency Verification of Conditions)Request/Application Type:Rezoning (PD to PD-SIP), Amendment to Existing PD-GDPLegislative Files:4473343729Status:In Process
